parsed.summary: The commit renames the npm scope and adds an interactive menu to /glm:setup when already configured. Changes are confined to metadata (package.json, plugin manifests), markdown documentation (CHANGELOG, commands/setup.md), and a release card. No executable logic, auth boundaries, data mutations, or runtime code paths are affected. The interactive menu is declared in markdown for an LLM-based tool, not implemented in application code. No material risk found that would block shipping.
